synopsis: A Marvel one-shot written and illustrated by Peach Momoko. Centuries after the death of a great Sith Lord, a cult has risen to worship the dark side; its leader, Ankok, claims to be the Sith's rightful successor, and Kako and Gel come face to face with the truth of her power. Collects the story "The Followers of Ankok."
title: Star Wars: Visions - Peach Momoko
